selected_important_turn.text: Yes, Hopefully the weather holds up. So I was thinking, i am bringning my two kids along with me, and they will need food, so I was thinking i could take the three foods, and either one of the firewood or water, up to you.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete allocation from YOU and it claims all three foods (YOUR highest-priority item) while framing it as needed for your kids. Coming right after neutral small-talk, it sets a competitive, zero-sum tone and constrains later integrative possibilities.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Although it explains a legitimate need, it is framed as a full claim rather than an invitation to share or trade. That claim reduced bargaining space and signaled a self-focused stance before learning the other side's priorities, missing an early opportunity to build cooperation or discover potential tradeoffs.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the need explanation but soften the claim: present the need and then invite options (e.g., ask what they need, propose splitting food, or offer several alternatives rather than taking all three). Signal willingness to trade so integrative possibilities remain open.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (more room for mutually beneficial trades if you invite options rather than seize all food)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (will be perceived as fairer if you offer to split or trade rather than claim everything)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces defensiveness and opens easier path to agreement)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (more cooperative tone and empathy builds rapport)

value2reason.Low: The stream nearby is very clean
value2reason.Medium: It eliminates the heavy misquito coverage at night
value2reason.High: I am camping with two children, and need food to keep them comfortable

value2reason.Low: I can do without water, but will take it.
value2reason.Medium: I don't like the dark, so this would help keep it light.
value2reason.High: when I get nervous or scared I eat, so I'd like more food

dialogue.text: I am good. I am pretty excited for the trip this weekend. what about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Very excited. It will be fun.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Yes, Hopefully the weather holds up. So I was thinking, i am bringning my two kids along with me, and they will need food, so I was thinking i could take the three foods, and either one of the firewood or water, up to you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need all three food packages for my kids. They’re hungry and need comfort. What do you need? Maybe we can split the food or trade for other items.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your kids need food, but I value food highly too. How about I take 2 food packages and 1 firewood, while you get 1 food and 2 firewood? That way, we both have enough for comfort and light.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need all three food packages for my kids. They’re hungry and need comfort. What do you need? Maybe we can split the food or trade for other items.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need all three food packages for my kids. They’re hungry and need comfort. What do you need? Maybe we can split the food or trade for other items.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need all three food packages for my kids. They’re hungry and need comfort. What do you need? Maybe we can split the food or trade for other items.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m willing to give you 1 food package if you agree to split the firewood evenly. It’s important for me to have enough food, but I’d prefer not to take all three. Let’s find a balance that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to accept your counteroffer of 3 packages for the tent and 2 for the sleeping bags, but I would like to add 1 more package for the camp stove. Let's discuss this further.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m flexible on firewood, but I need at least 2 food packages. If you take 1 food and 2 firewood, I’ll take the remaining 2 food and 1 firewood. That way, we both have enough for comfort and light.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to accept your counteroffer if you give me 2 food packages and 1 firewood. That way, I can still provide enough for my kids, and you get some food and firewood. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm okay with that deal. Let's confirm: you get 2 food and 1 firewood, and I take the remaining 1 food and 2 firewood. That works for me.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
